title: Slotted discs representative of formation fractures
abstract: A permeability plugging apparatus disk including a body, and a slot through the body, the slot being non-straight. Also disclosed is method for producing a particulate plugging apparatus disk including estimating a feature to be replicated for particle plugging testing, depositing layer by layer of a material according to a program in an additive manufacturing tool, leaving selective voids in the layer by layer construction to form the disk having a non-straight slot in a body and a permeability plugging apparatus disk including a body defining a pulser screen.
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A permeability plugging apparatus disk (10, 26, 50) comprising: a body (28); and a slot (30) through the body (28), the slot being non-straight (30). 2. The disk (10, 26, 50) claimed in claim 1 wherein the body (28) is cylindrical. 3. The disk (10, 26, 50) as claimed in claim 1 wherein the slot (30) is multifmgered. 4. The disk (10, 26, 50) as claimed in claim 1 wherein the slot (30) is zig-zag shaped. 5. The disk (10, 26, 50) as claimed in claim 1 wherein the slot (30) is of varying dimensions over a length of the slot (30). 6. The disk (10, 26, 50) as claimed in claim 1 wherein the slot (12) has dimensions that converge through a thickness (36) of the body (28). 7. The disk (10, 26, 50) as claimed in claim 1 wherein the slot (12) defines an inner surface. 8. The disk (10, 26, 50) as claimed in claim 7 wherein the inner surface is textured (40). 9. The disk (10, 26, 50) as claimed in claim 1 wherein the slot (30) is of a tortuous form through a thickness (36) of the body (28). 10. The disk (10, 26, 50) as claimed in claim 1 wherein the body (28) is additively manufactured. 11. The disk (10, 26, 50) as claimed in claim 1 wherein the body (28) is separable along the slot (30). 12. A method for producing a particulate plugging apparatus disk (10, 26, 50) comprising: estimating a feature to be replicated for particle plugging testing; depositing layer by layer of a material according to a program in an additive manufacturing tool; leaving selective voids in the layer by layer construction to form the disk (10, 26, 50) having a non-straight slot (30) in a body (28). 13. The method as claimed in claim 12 further comprising: texturing an inner surface of the slot (30). 14. A permeability plugging apparatus disk (10, 26, 50) comprising: a body (28) defining a pulser screen.
